\tzpentry{ID4757}{Magnetic Field Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4757 introduces Magnetic Field Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathbf{B} = \\mu_0 \\mu_r (\\mathbf{H} + \\mathbf{M}) \\implies \\frac{d\\omega}{dt} = -\\gamma(\\omega - \\omega_0) - K \\sin(2(\\theta - \\theta_0))\n\\end{equation}
